semantic.role: Defines the automated process for publishing the initial placeholder version of the ArchSpine package to the official npm registry.
responsibilities: Checks for existing published package to avoid name collisions
Runs a release gate before publishing
outOfScope: Actual source code or architecture of the ArchSpine project

English.purpose: This document provides the script and logic for securely publishing the ArchSpine placeholder package (version 0.0.1) to npm, ensuring that no existing package with the same name is overwritten and that all pre-release checks pass.
English.context_and_audience: Developers responsible for initializing the ArchSpine project on npm, particularly the first-time publishing workflow.
key_takeaways: The script enforces a strict placeholder version check (0.0.1).
It verifies the package name is not already taken on npm.
A release gate command (npm run release:gate) must pass before publishing.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档提供了安全地将 ArchSpine 占位包（版本 0.0.1）发布到 npm 的脚本和逻辑，确保不会覆盖已存在的同名包，并且所有发布前检查均通过。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 负责在 npm 上初始化 ArchSpine 项目的开发者，特别是首次发布工作流的执行者。
key_takeaways: 脚本强制检查占位版本 0.0.1。
会验证该包名在 npm 上是否已被占用。
发布前必须通过 release gate 命令（npm run release:gate）。
